description.en: The China Communications Industry Association (CACE) is the national industry organization representing Chinese telecommunications operators, equipment manufacturers, software developers, and service providers in the information and communications technology (ICT) sector. Operating under the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology (MIIT), CACE publishes statistics and analysis reports on China's telecommunications industry, including network infrastructure deployment, subscriber growth, traffic volumes, enterprise revenues, and R&D investment. As China operates the world's largest 5G network and has the largest number of internet users and mobile subscribers, CACE data is critical for tracking the country's digital economy development, ICT sector competitiveness, and technology leadership trends including fiber broadband penetration, 5G base station deployment, and data center capacity.
description.zh: 中国通信企业协会（中通企协）是代表中国电信运营商、设备制造商、软件开发商和服务提供商的全国性行业组织，主管单位为工业和信息化部。协会发布中国电信行业统计数据和分析报告，涵盖网络基础设施部署、用户增长、流量规模、企业营收和研发投入等。中国拥有全球最大的5G网络，以及最多的互联网用户和移动用户，中通企协的数据对于追踪中国数字经济发展、ICT行业竞争力，以及光纤宽带渗透率、5G基站部署和数据中心容量等技术领先趋势至关重要。

en: Telecom revenue and investment: monthly main business revenue of telecommunications operators and fixed asset investment in network infrastructure by operator and region
Mobile subscriber statistics: monthly total mobile phone users, 4G and 5G subscriber counts, and penetration rates by province and operator (China Mobile, China Unicom, China Telecom)
5G deployment tracking: monthly 5G base station installation numbers by province, cumulative 5G connections, and 5G traffic share of total mobile data
Broadband and fiber access: monthly fixed broadband subscribers by speed tier, fiber-to-the-home (FTTH) connections, and average download speeds
Internet traffic data: monthly total internet data traffic volumes, mobile internet data consumption per user, and traffic growth rates
Data center capacity: annual statistics on data center rack counts, power usage effectiveness (PUE), and cloud service provider capacity by region
Industry enterprise rankings: annual revenue rankings of major telecom operators, equipment vendors (Huawei, ZTE, etc.), and ICT service companies
R&D and technology investment: annual research and development expenditure in the ICT sector, patent applications, and technology commercialization data
Digital economy contribution: annual assessment of ICT sector contribution to GDP, employment in the digital economy, and digitalization indices by industry
zh: 电信收入与投资：电信运营商月度主营业务收入及按运营商和地区分类的网络基础设施固定资产投资
移动用户统计：月度手机用户总量、4G和5G用户数量及各省和运营商（中国移动、中国联通、中国电信）渗透率
5G部署追踪：各省月度5G基站建设数量、5G累计连接数及5G流量占移动数据总流量比例
宽带和光纤接入：按速率档位分类的固定宽带用户月度数据、光纤到户（FTTH）连接数和平均下载速度
互联网流量数据：互联网月度数据流量总量、人均移动互联网数据消费量和流量增长率
数据中心容量：按地区分类的数据中心机架数量、电能利用效率（PUE）和云服务商容量年度统计
行业企业排名：主要电信运营商、设备商（华为、中兴等）和ICT服务公司年度营收排名
研发与技术投入：ICT行业年度研发支出、专利申请量和技术成果转化数据
数字经济贡献：ICT行业对GDP贡献、数字经济就业规模及各行业数字化指数年度评估
